full_text:
Zhang Hu 張虎
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Hu (張虎). Son of Zhang Liao. Defended against Zhuge Liang along with Yue Chen. Zhang Hu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
